TITLE Greek Yogurt Marinated Chicken

LINK https://savorfield.com/recipe/greek-yogurt-marinated-chicken/

{[Marinade]
# In a large bowl whisk together [1 cup greek yogurt], [3 tbl olive oil], [2 tbl lemon juice], [3 cloves garlic[, minced]], [1 tsp [dried] oregano], [1 tsp cumin], [1 tsp smoked paprika], [1/2 tsp salt], and [1/2 tsp pepper] until smooth.
}

# Coat [1 lbs chicken breast] with $[Marinade] in a resealable bag or shallow dish.
# Refrigerate at least 1 hour, preferably 4 hours or overnight.
# Preheat grill or oven to medium-high heat; lightly oil the grates if grilling.
# Remove chicken from marinade, letting excess drip off; discard used marinade.
# Grill 6-7 minutes per side, or bake at 400F for 25-30 minutes, until cooked through and the internal temp reaches 165F.
# Let rest 5 minutes before slicing.
# Serve garnished with chopped [fresh parsley] and [lemon wedges] to squeeze over the top.
